name: Polenta Col Ragu Di Bacala
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Bacala or Staccotisso (fish, bones and skinless)
1/2 medium red onion, chopped into 1/4-inch dice
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak Bacala for 3 days in cold water, changing water daily.
2. Cut into 1-inch cubes.
3. Heat olive oil until smoking in a 4-quart saucepan.
4. Add onion and garlic to the hot oil and cook over medium-high heat until softened and light golden brown, about 8 to 10 minutes.
5. Add Bacala to the pan and stir until well mixed with onions.
6. Add wine, tomato sauce, fennel seeds, and hot chilies; bring to a boil.
7. Lower heat and simmer for 1 hour or until reduced by one third.
8. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
9. Lightly oil two 10-inch cake pans.
10. Make polenta according to package instructions and, while still hot, pour into the cake pans to fill halfway with polenta; allow to cool for about 15 minutes.
11. Divide Bacala over polenta in each pan and place in the oven to bake for 45 minutes.
12. Remove from oven and let rest for 10 minutes before cutting into wedges like a cake.
13. Serve with steamed fennel dressed like a salad.
Yield: 4 servings
